ISSUE_1_VALIDATION_SCORE: 90 - The recommendation to "address this issue with the supplier or provider" regarding the currency mismatch (CHF instead of EUR) is valid and actionable. The recommendation correctly identifies the problem based on Global People's requirement that receipts should be submitted with the same currency. It correctly identifies that the receipt should show "Global People DE GmbH" with the full address and VAT number as required by ICP policies. The recommendation is actionable and directly addresses the compliance issue.

ISSUE_3_VALIDATION_SCORE: 85 - The recommendation that "Hotel expenses will be grossed up as per Global People's policy" is valid and aligns with the compliance rule that "All approved expenses will be paid as NET to the employee and grossed up if they are not tax free." For example, suggesting that the employee should include exchange rate documentation or noting that they should expect the gross-up in their payroll would make the recommendations more actionable.
